calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert Cohen, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Brian O'Connor.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Robert S. Ferguson sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

The following written isntrument recorded on September 1, 2010 as Document No. 2010-J043060-00 (Reel K220 Image 0568) in the Official Records of the County of San Francisco is hereby cancelled nunc pro tunc and declared to be null and void ab initio with respect to the real property commonly know as 388 Townsend Stree #6, San Francisco, CA 94107 (hereafter"Subject Property") and legally described as follows:
PARCELL I, PARCELL II, PARCELL III, PARCELL IV, and PARCELL V. see scanned judgment.
Quiet Title Cause of Action: That Qiet Tilte is ordered as of October 26, 2000 for the Subject Property that any interests of Defendant Brian O'Connor is junior, subordinate, and subject to the rights of Plaintiff under the Deed of Trust dated October 16, 2000 recorded on October 26, 2000 in the Official Records of San Francisco County as Document No. 2000-G855276-00 (Reel H751 Image 155);
Declares that the written instrument entitled "FULL RECONVEYANCE" recorded on September 1, 2010 as Document No. 2010-J043060-00 (Reel K220 Image 0568) in the official Records of the County of San Francisco is null, void and of no legal force and effect.
Further declares that Defendant BRIAN O'CONNOR has no rights, title or interst in and to the Subject Property that is senior or superior to the claim of Plaintiff based on Plaintiff's Deed of Trust dated October 16, 2000 that was recorde on October 26, 2000 in the Official Records of San Francisco County as Document No. 200-G855276-00 (Reel H751 Image 0155):
Plaintiff is awarded cost of suit in the amount of $801.00 and against Defendant BRIAN O'CONNOR;
Plaintiff is awarded reasonable attorney's fees in the amount of $5,000.00 against Defendant BRIAN O'CONNOR.

Judgment signed in open court.
